2023.methodology: Mean and standard deviation of per-field NDVI (CDSE Sentinel Hub Process API, Sentinel-2 L2A, NDVI_EVALSCRIPT with sampleType FLOAT32) masked to each field's own polygon (not just its padded bounding box) and cloud/no-data pixels (dataMask), computed per month across the listed source fields. The std is used to draw a +/-1 std 'acceptable range' band around the benchmark line. Source fields are official EuroCrops-declared parcels of the same crop, excluding whichever field the app was evaluating at compute time.

Mean and standard deviation of per-field NDVI (CDSE Sentinel Hub Process API, Sentinel-2 L2A, NDVI_EVALSCRIPT with sampleType FLOAT32) masked to each field's own polygon (not just its padded bounding box) and cloud/no-data pixels (dataMask), computed per month across the listed source fields. The std is used to draw a +/-1 std 'acceptable range' band around the benchmark line. Source fields are official EuroCrops-declared parcels of the same crop, excluding whichever field the app was evaluating at compute time.

Mean and standard deviation of per-field NDVI (CDSE Sentinel Hub Process API, Sentinel-2 L2A, NDVI_EVALSCRIPT with sampleType FLOAT32) masked to each field's own polygon (not just its padded bounding box) and cloud/no-data pixels (dataMask), computed per month across the listed source fields. The std is used to draw a +/-1 std 'acceptable range' band around the benchmark line. Source fields are official EuroCrops-declared parcels of the same crop, excluding whichever field the app was evaluating at compute time.

Benchmark year is fixed to 2023 (the EuroCrops sample's declaration year — the one year the declared crop is actually known to be correct; a later year risks the field having rotated to a different crop since declaration). For each crop, up to BENCHMARK_FIELDS_PER_CROP other EuroCrops-declared fields of that crop are used, excluding fields smaller than MIN_BENCHMARK_FIELD_AREA_HA (too few clean 10m Sentinel-2 pixels post-masking to trust) and excluding whichever field the app was evaluating at compute time. Per field: real NDVI (CDSE Sentinel Hub Process API, Sentinel-2 L2A, NDVI_EVALSCRIPT with sampleType FLOAT32) masked to both cloud/no-data pixels (dataMask) and the field's own polygon (not just its padded bounding box). Mean and standard deviation are then taken per month across the field pool; the std drives the +/-1 std 'acceptable range' band drawn around the benchmark line.
